title: The Comancheros
writer: James Edward Grant, Clair Huffaker, Paul Wellman
actors: John Wayne, Stuart Whitman, Ina Balin
plot: Texas Ranger Jake Cutter arrests gambler Paul Regret, but soon finds himself teamed with his prisoner in an undercover effort to defeat a band of renegade arms merchants and thieves dealing with the Comanches known as Comancheros.
